evidence: "This show could be so much better. It has its good episodes but in only half of all 4 seasons!!"
"The season has its slow episodes mind you but as they begin to introduce all these super-powered guys and character development gets a goin' it really moves from 3-star to 5-star quality..."
"The only think kiddie about this show is the pencil work. Definately get it. Don't wait!!"
"The action is non-stop from beginning to end. It's straight out X-men, juggernaut, Brotherhood of Mutants, police, and everybody else BRAWWLL!!"
"Great art. Some don't like the revamped art in the last volume but c'mon get over it. The stories are still great and the action gets amped up even more."
"I must say that the ending to the movie is one of the greatest I have ever seen in a movie."
"I know, because I have all of them."
"If you haven't seen it. Then You need to. If you have, you need to get this DVD."
"The cinematic style for the show has gotten better but theres not enough ACTION to go with it."
"This is what Batman was meant to be. Who would have thought Batman could be ressurected after the dreadfull Batman and Robin?"
"If you haven't seen it. Then You need to. If you have, you need to get this DVD."

summary: The user has a strong preference for action-packed superhero narratives, often expressing frustration with slow pacing and lack of action in certain shows. They appreciate high production quality and emotional depth, particularly in well-crafted stories, while showing less loyalty to specific creators.
